The old way

Sound familiar?

Every landlord we spoke to said the same things.

📓

Tracking payments in a notebook

Flipping through pages to find who paid this month — and inevitably missing someone.

📲

Chasing tenants on WhatsApp

Typing the same reminder message to every tenant, one by one, every month.

🧮

Calculating electricity + rent manually

Adding up base rent, electricity units, water for each tenant every time.

🔍

Can't find old payment records

When a dispute arises, you spend an hour digging for that one transaction.

There's a better way.

Features

Everything in one place.

No more switching between notebooks, spreadsheets, and WhatsApp.

Auto-billing

Bills generate themselves — every month.

Set up your rooms once. EasyRent creates rent bills on the 1st of each month, tracks partial payments, marks overdue accounts, and keeps a full audit trail.

  • Auto-generates from move-in date
  • Supports partial payments
  • Marks overdue automatically
  • Complete payment history
April 20263 / 5 paid

WhatsApp reminders

Send payment reminders with one click.

Connected to WhatsApp? Send a professional payment reminder to any tenant instantly — with their balance, due date, and portal link included.

  • Connects to your WhatsApp number
  • Professional formatted message
  • Portal link auto-included
  • Works from the payment screen

EasyRent

Payment reminder

Rent Due — April 2026

Dear Ravi,

Your rent is due this month.
Amount: Rs 8,000
Due: April 1, 2026

View your portal:
easyrent.app/portal/…
10:32 AM ✓✓

Sending to

Ravi Sharma · +977-98XXXXXXXX

Tenant portal

Every tenant gets their own private portal.

Share a unique link. Your tenant sees their current bill, full payment history, and PDF receipts — no login needed. No more 'how much do I owe?' calls.

  • No password — link is the access key
  • Current bill + full history
  • Downloadable PDF receipts
  • Maintenance request form

Your portal

From the beta

Landlords love it.

“Before EasyRent I was using a diary for everything. Now I open the app, see who's paid, and send reminders in one click. The WhatsApp feature alone saves me hours every month.”

RG

Rajesh Gurung

8 rooms · Kathmandu

“My tenants love the portal. They see their bill, past payments, and download receipts themselves. I barely get payment-related calls anymore.”

SS

Sunita Sharma

12 rooms · Lalitpur

“Setup took 15 minutes. I added my rooms and tenants, and it started generating bills automatically. Exactly what I needed — nothing more, nothing less.”

BT

Bikash Thapa

5 rooms · Pokhara

How it works

Up and running in minutes.

No training needed. Add your property and start tracking today.

01

Add your rooms

Create a room for each unit with monthly rent and recurring charges (electricity, water). Done once — applied every month forever.

02

Add your tenants

Enter move-in dates and contact details. Billing starts automatically from their first month. No manual invoice creation, ever.

03

Track & collect

Record payments as they arrive. Send WhatsApp reminders, share receipt links, and see at a glance exactly who owes what.

Pricing

Simple, honest pricing.

Start free. Upgrade when you have more rooms.

Free

Rs 0/month

Forever, for up to 3 rooms

Get Started Free
  • Up to 3 rooms
  • Unlimited tenants
  • Monthly auto-billing
  • Tenant self-service portal
  • Dashboard & reports
  • Move-in anniversary alerts
